meaning: n. Organization of Petroleum Exporting Countries,石油输出国家组织
examples: Each member of OPEC would seek to maximize its own production.
OPEC production is holding at around 21.5 million barrels a day.
Only if non-OPEC nations, including Norway, Mexico, and Russia, were to trim output by a total of 500,000 barrels a day.
Commodity prices, a barometer of excessive money creation, are depressed, except for OPEC-manipulated oil.
The US, in particular, has been trying to apply pressure to Opec to modify any output cuts.
